title: Transporte y viajes básicos
communication_goal: Usar transporte y viajes básicos en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to transporte y viajes básicos.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla transporte y viajes básicos mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: How do you travel?
lessons.objective: Nombrar medios de transporte y explicar cómo te desplazas en situaciones cotidianas.

activities.prompt: You travel on rails in a ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Train viaja sobre rieles.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el transporte que usa vías de tren.

activities.prompt: I go to work ___ bus.
activities.feedback_correct: Usamos by bus para indicar el medio de transporte.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la preposición de medios de transporte.

activities.prompt: A plane leaves from an ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Airport es el aeropuerto.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el lugar de salida de los aviones.

activities.instruction: Une el transporte con el lugar relacionado.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas transportes con lugares de salida o llegada.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa dónde esperas o tomas cada medio de transporte.

activities.prompt: by / I / travel / train
activities.feedback_correct: La estructura es sujeto + travel + by + transporte.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca I al principio y by train al final.

activities.prompt: I usually go to work by bus, but today I am taking a taxi because it is raining.
activities.question: How is the speaker going to work today?
activities.feedback_correct: Today I am taking a taxi indica el transporte de hoy.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la parte después de but today.

activities.prompt: I go by bus. She travels by train. We take a taxi. They fly by plane.
evaluation_criteria: clear by bus and by train
activities.feedback_correct: Los medios de transporte se entienden claramente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica train sin añadir una vocal final y diferencia bus de buzz.

activities.prompt: Marta travels from Madrid to Valencia by train. She leaves at 8:00 and arrives at 10:00. From the station, she takes a taxi to her hotel.
activities.question: How does Marta go from the station to the hotel?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice she takes a taxi to her hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el transporte después de From the station.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about how you travel to work, school, shops, and one other place. Include reasons for two choices.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar cómo te desplazas y por qué.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa by + transporte y on foot para caminar.

activities.instruction: Planifica un trayecto con la IA.
activities.prompt: You need to travel across a city. Ask the AI about transport options, choose one, and explain how you will reach the final destination.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de transporte y elegir una ruta sencilla.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra opciones visuales y compara tiempo y facilidad con frases A1.

lessons.title: Tickets and schedules
lessons.objective: Comprar billetes y preguntar por horarios, destinos y precios de transporte.

activities.prompt: You want a ticket to London.
options: I'd like a ticket to London, please.
activities.correct_answer: I'd like a ticket to London, please.
activities.feedback_correct: Es una forma cortés de comprar un billete.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una petición con destino y ticket.

activities.prompt: What time does the train ___?
activities.feedback_correct: Después de does usamos la forma base leave.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Recuerda que does ya lleva la marca de tercera persona.

activities.prompt: How much is a one-way ticket?
activities.feedback_correct: How much pregunta por el precio.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una respuesta con una cantidad de dinero.

activities.instruction: Une la expresión con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces vocabulario básico de billetes y horarios.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada término con la parte del viaje que describe.

activities.prompt: the / what time / bus / does / leave
activities.correct_answer: What time does the bus leave?
activities.feedback_correct: La estructura es What time + does + sujeto + verbo base.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca does antes de the bus y leave al final.

activities.prompt: The train to Bristol leaves at 10:20 from platform four. It arrives at 11:45.
activities.question: Which platform does the train leave from?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice from platform four.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el número después de leaves at 10:20.

activities.prompt: I'd like a return ticket to Bristol, please. What time does the train leave? How much is it?
activities.feedback_correct: Tu petición y tus preguntas suenan claras.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica return ticket como un grupo y reduce la pausa entre does y leave.

activities.prompt: Bus 24 to the airport: departures 7:00, 8:30, and 10:00. The journey takes forty minutes. A ticket costs five dollars.
activities.question: How long does the journey take?
activities.feedback_correct: El horario indica the journey takes forty minutes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración sobre duración, no el precio.

activities.prompt: Write a ten-line dialogue at a train or bus station. Ask destination, departure time, platform, price, and ticket type.

activities.instruction: Compra un billete con la IA.
activities.prompt: Buy a ticket from the AI. Ask about two departures, compare prices and arrival times, choose a ticket, and repeat the final details.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes comprar un billete y confirmar la información esencial.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra un horario y repite solo los datos que necesites practicar.

lessons.title: Arrive and check in
lessons.objective: Comunicarse en un hotel básico, confirmar una reserva y pedir información sencilla sobre la estancia.

activities.prompt: You arrive at a hotel. What do you say?
activities.feedback_correct: Es la frase natural para informar que tienes una reserva.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una frase con have y reservation.

activities.prompt: What time is ___?
activities.feedback_correct: What time is breakfast? pregunta la hora del desayuno.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca una actividad del hotel que tenga una hora.

activities.prompt: You need internet access.
activities.feedback_correct: Es la pregunta para saber si hay internet inalámbrico.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la opción relacionada con conexión a internet.

activities.instruction: Une la frase con su función.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces frases útiles al llegar a un hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la frase confirma, pregunta o solicita algo.

activities.prompt: a / Can / have / I / towel
activities.feedback_correct: Can I have...? es una petición cortés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con Can I have y añade el objeto.

activities.prompt: Guest: Hello, I have a reservation under Garcia. Clerk: Yes, here it is. Room 205. Breakfast is from seven to ten, and the elevator is on your left.
activities.question: What is the room number?
activities.feedback_correct: La recepción dice Room 205.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el número después de Room.

activities.prompt: Hello, I have a reservation under Garcia. What time is breakfast? Is there Wi-Fi? Thank you.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes comunicar tus necesidades básicas en un hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica reservation y breakfast lentamente y usa entonación amable.

activities.instruction: Lee la información del hotel y responde.
activities.prompt: Welcome to the Blue Hotel. Check-out is at eleven. Breakfast is on the first floor from seven to ten. The elevator is next to reception. Wi-Fi is free.
activities.question: Where is breakfast?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice on the first floor.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la ubicación después de Breakfast is.

activities.prompt: Write a ten-line hotel dialogue. Include a reservation, room number, breakfast time, Wi-Fi question, and one request for help.
Check into a hotel after a long journey. Confirm your reservation, ask about breakfast and transport, request one item, and respond to the receptionist.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes resolver necesidades esenciales al llegar a un hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA usa una recepción virtual y repite las frases clave según tus errores.

lessons.title: A complete travel day
lessons.objective: Integrar transporte, billetes, horarios, direcciones y necesidades de hotel en un viaje sencillo.

activities.prompt: You need to know where the train leaves.
activities.feedback_correct: Platform indica el lugar de salida del tren.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la pregunta relacionada con el lugar de salida.

activities.prompt: I am going ___ plane.
activities.feedback_correct: Decimos travel by plane.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa by con el medio de transporte.

activities.prompt: Where is the hotel from the station?
options: It is five minutes by taxi.
activities.correct_answer: It is five minutes by taxi.
activities.feedback_correct: La respuesta da distancia y transporte.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una respuesta sobre ubicación o distancia.

activities.prompt: a / I / need / return / ticket / to / Boston
activities.correct_answer: I need a return ticket to Boston.
activities.feedback_correct: La frase expresa una necesidad de viaje con destino.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I need y coloca el destino al final.

activities.instruction: Une la situación con la frase útil.

pairs.right: Could you show me the way?

activities.feedback_correct: Seleccionas frases útiles para cada etapa del viaje.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada problema con la información que necesitas.

activities.prompt: First, take the train to Brighton. It leaves at 9:15 from platform three. At the station, take a taxi to the Blue Hotel. Check-in is at two.
activities.question: What platform does the train leave from?
activities.feedback_correct: El itinerario dice from platform three.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la información después de leaves at 9:15.

activities.prompt: I take the train at nine fifteen from platform three. Then I take a taxi to the hotel. I have a reservation.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu itinerario es claro y fácil de seguir.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica los datos como grupos: nine fifteen, platform three, take a taxi.

activities.prompt: Sofia flies to Chicago on Monday. Her plane leaves at 11:00. She takes a bus from the airport to her hotel. She has a reservation for three nights.
activities.question: How does Sofia travel from the airport to the hotel?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice she takes a bus from the airport.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración sobre el trayecto después del vuelo.

activities.prompt: Write a complete one-day travel plan with departure, transport, platform or gate, arrival, route to a hotel, check-in, and one question for help.

activities.instruction: Completa un viaje con la IA.
activities.prompt: Travel to a new city. Buy a ticket, ask for the platform, follow directions, check into a hotel, and solve one travel problem.
activities.role: native-speaking travel agent, station clerk, and hotel receptionist
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes manejar las situaciones esenciales de un viaje básico.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA cambia de rol y adapta el diálogo para practicar cada etapa.
